description: Product Description If you're looking for a warm winter sock women to accompany you on chilly days, fluffy socks will be a perfect choice for you. These fuzzy cozy socks are super warm ,soft and fluffy to keep your feet nice and toasty when sleeping or lounging at home, it is a perfect gift for your lover, friends, mother and colleagues. Soft and thermal Material Using very soft and thermal materialS to keep the feet warm and comfortable. Elastic Size Elastic coral fleece socks fit for 33~41 size feet. Simple Design Simple design and pure colors are very suitable for men wearing. Cozy and Fluffy Style Cozy style very fit for home and make you feel relaxing. Breathable and Soft Strong sweat absorbing ability always keep your feet dry. No Pilling Machine wash availble and would not cause pill. Adorable Winter Slipper Socks Different design will offer your different choices to match daily mood and outfit.Let your style to be varied, sometimes cute or mature, retro or fashionable. Perfect to be an Christmas gift for your girlfriend, mom, sister, grandmother or colleague.
